description:
**Milestone:** Pen Renderer — Visual Canvas

Wire up the .pen variable/theme system to the renderer. Build a PenThemeProvider context that holds the current theme selections (e.g., Mode=Dark, Base=Zinc, Accent=Violet). Resolve $-prefixed tokens in fills, strokes, and text colors by looking up variables with theme-dependent values. Add a theme switcher toolbar above the canvas that reads the file's theme axes and lets users toggle between values (e.g., Light/Dark toggle, color base picker). Theme changes re-render the canvas instantly via React context.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/ui/src/components/views/designs-view/renderer/pen-theme-context.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/designs-view/renderer/style-utils.ts
- apps/ui/src/components/views/designs-view/designs-toolbar.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/designs-view/designs-canvas.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] $--background resolves to correct hex value based on selected theme
- [ ] Theme switcher shows all axes from the file (Mode, Base, Accent)
- [ ] Toggling Mode between Light/Dark re-renders canvas with correct colors
- [ ] Changing Base/Accent updates all dependent variables
- [ ] Variables without theme values use default value
- [ ] shadcn-kit.pen renders correctly in both Light and Dark mode

**Complexity:** medium
title: Variable Resolution & Theme Switching
